name: tg-ws-proxy-mobile

scripts.build: echo 'Web assets already built, syncing with Capacitor...'
scripts.build:android: npm run sync && cd android && ./gradlew assembleRelease
scripts.build:ios: npm run sync && cd ios && xcodebuild -workspace App.xcworkspace -scheme App -configuration Release -archivePath App.xcarchive archive

author: Dupley Maxim Igorevich
